notes: Ultra-high molecular weight polyethylene (Dyneema SK99, Spectra). Density 0.97 g/cm³ — floats on water. Fiber tensile ~3.0 GPa (SK99). RHAe ~0.2-0.3 per mm vs small arms (7.62mm Ball, 5.56mm M855), higher against fragments (~0.4). Superior spall containment (low spallCoeff). Used as standalone lightweight armor, spall liners (M2A2 Bradley BUSK III), and helmet backing. Fails by melting/tearing, not shattering. BHN meaningless for this material.
